mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lecture ( member_id, major_id, year, semester, name, credit, type, ref_books, goal, weekly_plan, academic_year, max_std, start_date, end_date ) VALUES ( #{loginUserId}, #{majorId}, #{year}, #{semester}, #{lectureName}, #{credit}, #{lectureType}, #{refBooks}, #{goal}, #{weeklyPlan}, #{academicYear}, #{maxStd}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )

INSERT INTO lecture_schedule ( lecture_id, room_id, day_of_week, start_period, end_period ) VALUES ( #{lectureId}, (SELECT room_id FROM lecture_room WHERE room_number = #{roomNumber} LIMIT 1), #{dayOfWeek}, #{startPeriod}, #{endPeriod} )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.status, l.member_id, l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week as dayOfWeek, lr.building, lr.room_number as roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.is_open FROM lecture l JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id
AND l.member_id = #{loginUserId}

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.status FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

select l.member_id AS memberId, l.name AS lectureName, l.year, l.semester, l.type AS lectureType, l.credit, l.max_std AS maxStd,l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.ref_books AS refBooks, l.goal, l.weekly_plan AS weeklyPlan, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek
from lecture l left join lecture_schedule ls on l.lecture_id=ls.lecture_id left join lecture_room lr on ls.room_id=lr.room_id WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId}
